Functions for writing and checking the boot FPGA bitstream status.

# Purpose
This C header file declares two functions related to the management of an FPGA boot bitstream. The function [`mfg_info_write_boot_fpga_bitstream`](<#mfg_info_write_boot_fpga_bitstream>) is intended to write the boot bitstream to the FPGA, while [`mfg_info_is_boot_fpga_bitstream_written`](<#mfg_info_is_boot_fpga_bitstream_written>) checks if the boot bitstream has been successfully written. The inclusion of `<stdbool.h>` indicates that the code uses the `bool` type for boolean operations. The `#pragma once` directive ensures that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdbool.h`
